actions.description: 21st board meeting. Pivot updated to arcade-evolution (supersedes vanilla-js-restructure). Gate 2 at 3/8 — QA, Creative, PM submitted. 5 pending: R&D, DevOps, IT, UX/UI, CTO. Deadline 2026-05-31T14:00Z. 7 games, 15 clean QA cycles, zero bugs.

nextStep: Next meeting: check Gate 2 progress (target 8/8 assessments). If complete, advance to Gate 3 (PM execution plan).
